calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-03-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:33am

Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Candice Lee present in pro per. Respondents, Fo Siat Moy and Fo Fie Fong present in pro per. Shirley Fok interprets Indonesian/English and English/Indonesian on behalf of the Respondents. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman.

EXRA: Rental Lease
EXRB: Letters and copy of check
EXA1: Manilla folder with calculations, photos, worksheets and reciepts; collectively marked.
EXA2: List of itemized damages previously presented by Plaintiff and erroneously returned to Defendant.

11:20AM
Exhibits Retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Judgment Entered
